name: Performance Food Group Company
description: Performance Food Group Company (PFG) is a leading food and food-focused distributor in North America, with a history dating back to 1885. Headquartered in Richmond, Virginia, the company operates through three primary segments: Foodservice, Vistar, and Convenience. PFG provides a wide range of food and food-related products to a diverse customer base, including independent and chain restaurants, schools, healthcare facilities, and convenience stores. By combining deep industry expertise with a commitment to innovation and operational efficiency, PFG serves as a strategic partner dedicated to helping its customers' businesses thrive in a competitive marketplace.
